section_text_parts: Notice that status_code is a parameter of the "decorator" method ( get , post , etc). Not of your path operation function , like all the parameters and body.
tutorial/response-status-code::section-0.section_text: Notice that status_code is a parameter of the "decorator" method ( get , post , etc). Not of your path operation function , like all the parameters and body.

section_text_parts: status_code can alternatively also receive an IntEnum , such as Python's http.HTTPStatus .
tutorial/response-status-code::section-0.section_text: status_code can alternatively also receive an IntEnum , such as Python's http.HTTPStatus .

section_text_parts: Some response codes (see the next section) indicate that the response does not have a body.
FastAPI knows this, and will produce OpenAPI docs that state there is no response body.
tutorial/response-status-code::section-0.section_text:
Some response codes (see the next section) indicate that the response does not have a body.

FastAPI knows this, and will produce OpenAPI docs that state there is no response body.

section_text_parts: If you already know what HTTP status codes are, skip to the next section.
tutorial/response-status-code::section-0.section_text: If you already know what HTTP status codes are, skip to the next section.

section_text_parts: To know more about each status code and which code is for what, check the MDN documentation about HTTP status codes .
tutorial/response-status-code::section-0.section_text: To know more about each status code and which code is for what, check the MDN documentation about HTTP status codes .

section_links.text: MDN documentation about HTTP status codes

tutorial/response-status-code::section-0.title: Technical Details
section_text_parts: You could also use from starlette import status .
FastAPI provides the same starlette.status as fastapi.status just as a convenience for you, the developer. But it comes directly from Starlette.
tutorial/response-status-code::section-0.section_text:
You could also use from starlette import status .

FastAPI provides the same starlette.status as fastapi.status just as a convenience for you, the developer. But it comes directly from Starlette.
